title: A Position In The Hebrew Divinity.
content:
One man repentant is of more esteem
    With God, than one that never sinned 'gainst Him.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "A Position In The Hebrew Divinity."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
